body:value: The data refers to details on receipts from other related transactions undertaken. body:value: The data refers to state-wise details of recorded forest area (in square km). Recorded Forest Area refers to all the geographic areas recorded as 'Forests' in government records. It consists of Reserved Forests and Protected Forests which have been constituted under the provisions of the Indian Forest Act, 1927.

field_group_name:name: Environment and Forest

title: Recorded Forest Area in States and UTs

body:value: The data refers to details of region-wise area of different classes Gulf of Kachchh (area in sq. km). field_sector:name: Environment and Forest
title: Region-wise area of different classes Gulf of Kachchh

body:value: The data refers to details of region-wise area of different classes Lakshadweep (area in sq. km). These figures have been generated by Government of India through a project sanctioned to Forest Survey of India, Dehradun in the year 2003 titled Assessment, Mapping and Monitoring of Coral Reefs along the Coastal Regions of India using Remote Sensing and GIS. This data set has been sourced from the "India State of Forest Report 2011".

body:value: The Still Birth Rate is defined as the number of still births per thousand live births and still births during the year. Pre-partum still births are those which are occurring before labour, may reflect genetic or gestation conditions, including maternal nutritional status, and exposure to infection and toxins during pregnancy. Intra-partum deaths, those occurring during the birth process, can reflect the circumstances of the birth (including position of the foetus, multiple births, premature delivery, placenta praevia, pelvic deformations and accidents due to interference).
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: Family Welfare Statistics
field_ministry_department:name: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
Department of Health and Family Welfare
field_sector:name: Health and Family welfare
Family Welfare
title: Still Birth Rate India

title: Structure of Sarva Siksha Abhiyan Expenditure

body:value: The data refers to the observed student attendance rates and percentage of schools serving midday meals for the surveyed states. The outcome is based on the sample survey undertaken by Programme Evaluation Organisation (PEO), Planning commission in eleven states and two union territories for 'Evaluation Report On Sarva Shiksha Abhiyan, 2010'. The reference period for the study was 2003 to 2007.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: Education
field_ministry_department:name: NITI Aayog
field_sector:name: Education
Elementary
title: Student Attendance Rates and Midday Meals - Based on Sample Survey

body:value: The data refers to the Student responses on teachers' attendance and punishment. It provides details of percentage of students who reported teachers attend regularly and percentage of students who reported punishment by teachers. The outcome is based on the sample survey undertaken by Programme Evaluation Organisation (PEO), Planning commission in eleven states and two union territories for 'Evaluation Report On Sarva Shiksha Abhiyan, 2010'. The reference period for the study was 2003 to 2007.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: Education
field_ministry_department:name: NITI Aayog
field_sector:name: Education
Elementary
title: Student responses on teacher attendance and punishment - Based on Sample Survey

body:value: The Sub Divisional and District Hospitals are government hospitals with more than 30 beds. Mobile Medical Units have been envisaged under National Rural Health Mission (NRHM) to provide preventive, promotive and curative health care in inaccessible areas and difficult terrains, which are underserved or unserved areas under usual circumstances. Functional Mobile Medical Units not only look after the curative aspects but also render Behaviour Change Communication (BCC) activities to promote healthy under the NRHM.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: Rural Health Statistics
field_ministry_department:name: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
Department of Health and Family Welfare
field_sector:name: Health and Family welfare
Family Welfare
title: Sub Divisional Hospitals, District Hospitals and Mobile Medical Units Functioning
